name: Toolr UI Design Setup
description: Set up and enforce @toolr/ui-design compliance with custom ESLint rules, Claude Code hooks, and optional pre-commit gates.
longDescription:
Guided setup for enforcing `@toolr/ui-design` in a consuming app. Creates `eslint-plugin-toolr-design.js` with **7 custom rules**:

- **Token enforcement** (3): no-raw-spacing, no-raw-colors, no-raw-text-size
- **Component enforcement** (2): prefer-design-components, no-browser-dialogs
- **Import enforcement** (2): no-deep-imports, no-direct-icon-imports

Also sets up a PostToolUse hook (`check-ui-patterns.sh`) for real-time feedback on Write/Edit, the Tailwind v4 type scale fix, and optional pre-commit hooks via lint-staged or `.githooks/`. All rules read enforcement data from `ai-manifest.json` at runtime.
